title: Discover and invoke the CLASSIFY agent contract
preconditions: CLASSIFY is locally available to the owner process and exposes a versioned contract descriptor.
postconditions: The host can orchestrate the workflow without scraping prose, bypassing owner intent, reading CLASSIFY storage, or receiving unrelated financial data.
main_flow: The host obtains operation, request, result, error, and compatibility schemas; checks supported versions; invokes classify.evaluate, classify.outcome.get, classify.apply.preview, classify.apply.run, classify.rule.save, classify.rule.validate, classify.rule.activate, classify.rule.retire, classify.feedback.record, classify.status, classify.abandon, or classify.cleanup non-interactively; consumes structured standard output and stable exit categories; and treats standard error as metadata-only diagnostics.
alt_flows: Reject unsupported contract versions before reading or mutation.
Return stable structured validation errors for malformed requests.
Do not emit transaction descriptions, normalized tokens, rules, or financial values to diagnostic logs.
Fail closed when owner identity, local file permissions, or downstream compatibility cannot be established.
metadata: {"depth_tier":2,"primary_actor":"P1","trigger":"The AI Agent Host needs to discover CLASSIFY capabilities or invoke a classification workflow for the owner.","status":"draft"}
